channel.title: SevenAtSevenSportsAndEntertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenSportsAndEntertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Taylor Swift Goes Makeup-Free in Behind-the-Scenes Video for "Opalite"
item.description: Taylor Swift is revealing how she made her own sunshine. Since the release of the “Opalite” music video on Feb. 6, the Life of a Showgirl artist has c...

item.title: Tearful Savannah Guthrie Says Mom Nancy Guthrie "May Already Be Gone"
item.description: Savannah Guthrie is pleading for Nancy Guthrie's return. Nearly one month after the Today co-host's 84-year-old mother was abducted from her Tucson, A...

item.title: Rodeo Champion Kelsie Domer's Daughter, 3, Dies After Horse Accident
item.description: Kelsie Domer is mourning the unimaginable. The 10-time Women's Professional Rodeo Association world champion's 3-year-old daughter Oaklynn died Feb. 1...

item.title: Sharon Osbourne Details “Complex” Relationship With Blended Family
item.description: Sharon Osbourne is setting the record straight on her family’s dynamics. Months after the death of her late husband Ozzy Osbourne—who was dad to Jessi...

item.title: Beverly Hills, 90210's Gabrielle Carteris Details "Disfiguring" Injury
item.description: Gabrielle Carteris is looking back on a life-changing moment. The Beverly Hills, 90210 alum recalled an injury she suffered while shooting a film in C...

item.title: Offset Gets Physical On WWE 'RAW,' Throws Grayson Waller Over Table
item.description: Offset didn't just hit up "Monday Night Raw" in Atlanta to catch some WWE action ... he was IN on the action -- 'cause the Grammy-nominated rapper fou...

item.title: Jack Hughes Downplays Trump Phone Call Controversy, Defends Women’s Team
item.description: Team USA’s toothless hero Jack Hughes is making it clear there's nothing but love between the men's and women's gold medal-winning squads ... saying a...

item.title: Nancy Guthrie Kidnapper Still Photo Did Not Produce Any Significant Leads
item.description: Nancy Guthrie's kidnapper was at her house before the actual kidnapping, but the photo of the presumed kidnapper has not resulted in any significant l...

item.title: 'American Idol' Contestant Dimitrius Graham Arrested in Los Angeles
item.description: "American Idol" finalist Dimitrius Graham was arrested in Los Angeles Sunday and booked on a trespassing charge ... TMZ has learned. The head-turning ...

item.title: Robert Carradine's Daughter Shares Heartfelt Tribute After His Death
item.description: Robert Carradine's daughter says her dad was a lover, not a fighter ... and, the whole world could learn a lesson by trying to follow his example, she...

item.title: Sylvester Stallone's Best Acting Isn't In Rocky But Is In This '80s Action Movie
Billy Bob Thornton's Villain Stole This Infamous 1990s Action Movie With Only 3 Minutes Of Screentime
An Upcoming Sequel To A 20-Year-Old Film May Be A Major 2026 Box Office Competitor
